'''zhodhasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixerbaceous|ixerbaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixerbaceous|ixerbaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhodhasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || zhodhasithi || zhodhasiji || zhodhasishi || zhodhasiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || zhodhasuthu || zhodhasuju || zhodhasushu || zhodhasuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || zhodhasuthu || zhodhasuju || zhodhasushu || zhodhasuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || zhodhasufthuf || zhodhasufjuf || zhodhasufshuf || zhodhasufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zhodhasethe || zhodhaseje || zhodhaseshe || zhodhaseke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zhodhasotho || zhodhasojo || zhodhasosho || zhodhasoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zhodhasotho || zhodhasojo || zhodhasosho || zhodhasoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zhodhasofthof || zhodhasofjof || zhodhasofshof || zhodhasofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhodhasïfthïf || zhodhasïfjïf || zhodhasïfshïf || zhodhasïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhodhasïfthïf || zhodhasïfjïf || zhodhasïfshïf || zhodhasïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhodhasïfthïf || zhodhasïfjïf || zhodhasïfshïf || zhodhasïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhodhasïfthïf || zhodhasïfjïf || zhodhasïfshïf || zhodhasïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || zhodhasæthæ || zhodhasæjæ || zhodhasæshæ || zhodhasækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || zhodhasatha || zhodhasaja || zhodhasasha || zhodhasaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || zhodhasatha || zhodhasaja || zhodhasasha || zhodhasaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || zhodhasafthaf || zhodhasafjaf || zhodhasafshaf || zhodhasafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || zhodhasasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || zhodhasshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || zhodhasroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || zhodhasmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || zhodhasyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozhodhasnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhodhasnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozhodhasnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozhodhasnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || zhodhadhasasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || zhodhadhasshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || zhodhadhasroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || zhodhadhasmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || zhodhadhasyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozhodhadhasnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhodhadhasnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozhodhadhasnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozhodhadhasnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || zhedhæsasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || zhedhæsshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || zhedhæsroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || zhedhæsmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || zhedhæsyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozhedhæsnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhedhæsnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozhedhæsnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozhedhæsnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || zhodhfasasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || zhodhfasshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || zhodhfasroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || zhodhfasmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || zhodhfasyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gozhodhfasnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gozhodhfasnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gozhodhfasnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gozhodhfasnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
